measurement_method: Unique domains per session (not lanes/domains — S406 FRONTIER.md had flawed denominator)

target.note: S406 FRONTIER.md claimed 14.8% — FLAWED. Used 6.4 lanes/session / 43 domains; correct metric is unique domains. Actual 11.9% (S396-S406) and 10.0% (S400-S409).

variance_analysis.finding: Bundle sessions (meta+exp+DOMEX) drive almost all coverage. Solo DUE-clearing sessions = 2-7%. Session TYPE predicts coverage variance (r>0.8 estimated).

personality_diversity.note: Inherited from S406: only 15/54 roles used (28%). META-dominant at 19% of lanes.
personality_diversity.updated_note: S407-S409 are all solo meta/eval/nk — even more concentrated than S396-S406 baseline.

verdict: NOT RESOLVED. Coverage stable 10-12% vs 15% target. Variance is session-type driven (bundle vs solo). Flawed FRONTIER.md annotation corrected.
